title: uva-ursi procumbens
intro: Uva-ursi procumbens, also known as bearberry or kinnikinnick, is a low-growing, evergreen shrub native to North America. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its ability to treat urinary tract infections due to its high concentration of arbutin, a natural compound with antibacterial and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of uva-ursi procumbens include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and act as a natural diuretic. Uva-ursi procumbens can be prepared into various herbal remedies, such as teas, tinctures, and capsules, which can be used to support urinary health and overall well-being.
